name: Low-Fat Healthy Chili in Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the beef of all visible fat. Cut into half-inch cubes.
2. Place meat in crockpot and stir in tomato paste to completely coat the meat.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and stir to blend. Do not add any additional liquid.
4. Cover and cook for 12 hours on low heat. When done, you can skim the fat from the surface and discard.
